channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T18:40Z — 902 outages, 29,101 customers, 144 fair-weather, 11 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1227 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH: 1172 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NC-DEP: 1143 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | PA-NY: 947 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
